titles.title: What Manner of Man Is Jesus

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: What Manner Of Man Is Jesus Halleluiah! What Manner of man is Jesus Halleluiah! What Manner of man is Jesus Halleluiah! What Manner of man is Jesus Halleluiah!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He healed the broken hearts Hallelujah! He healed the broken hearts Hallelujah! He healed the broken hearts Hallelujah! He healed the broken hearts Hallelujah!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He mend the broken hearts Hallelujah! He mend the broken hearts Hallelujah! He mend the broken hearts Hallelujah! He mend the broken hearts Halleluiah!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He makes the blind to see Halleluiah! He makes the blind to see Halleluiah! He makes the blind to see Halleluiah! He makes the blind to see Hallelujah!

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: He set the captive free Halleluiah! He set the captive free Hallelujah! He set the captive free Hallelujah! He set the captive free Hallelujah!

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Hallelujah Halleluiah Amen Halleluiah Halleluiah Amen Hallelujah Halleluiah Amen Halleluiah Halleluiah Amen
